duplicate_research_check: No other fixture conditions breakout persistence on prior compression.
falsifiability_assessment: Fixed range and persistence definitions make the proposed difference testable.
data_readiness_assessment: Approved Development bars are sufficient for the fixed descriptive labels.
leakage_and_overfit_risks: Trying several compression windows would create selection bias.
transaction_cost_challenge: False breaks and rapid reversals would challenge later executable use.
strongest_counterevidence: Compression boundaries may concentrate stops and increase false-break frequency.
alternative_explanations: Subsequent volatility expansion may explain persistence independently of compression.
score_adjustments: Apply medium risk and cost penalties under the frozen policy.
